headline: IS Wannabe Teens FUMBLE 💥😂 Bomb at NYC Mayor's Crib
text:
Two ISIS simp simps 👳‍♂️😩 – 18yo Emir Balat 🚫💣 and 19yo Ibrahim Kayumi 🕌🔥 – CAUGHT 🕵️‍♂️💥 tryna DROP HOMEMADE BOOMERS 💣🍆 outside NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani's 🏠👑 Gracie Mansion crib during ANTI-ISLAM RAGE FEST 🎉🤬! These noob jihadi bros 🧑‍💻🧨 dreamed BIGGER than Boston Marathon BLOODBATH 🏃‍♂️💀 (3 dead, limbs FLYING ✂️😱 back in 2013), but their glass bottle IEDs 🍼🔥 packed with TATP VOLATILE JUICE 💦☠️ + nuts & bolts shrapnel 🥜🔩 went TOTAL FIZZLE 🚫💨 – NONE popped off 😂🤡!

NYPD Queen Commissioner Jessica Tisch 👩‍✈️📢 SPILLING TEA ☕: 'These virgins watched IS PROPAGANDA PORN 🎥🕌 and confessed HARD 😤 – Balat even yapped "If I don't BOOM it, someone else will!" while getting HAULED 🚔, dreaming of MASSIVE CARNAGE bigger than Boston FINISH LINE SLAUGHTER 🏁💥!' Lucky AF 🍀 no one got mulched, but Tisch SLAYS: 'Luck ain't a strat, these coulda WIPED OUT crowds 😱💀!' Cops found THIRD BOMB 🤖🚗 in their Upper East Side whip via ROBOT SWAT 🦾🔍 – Jake Lang, that 1/6 PARDONED FAR-RIGHT TROLL 🤡🇺🇸 (J6 rioter turned protest daddy), organized the outnumbered anti-Islam clown show 🎪 vs 100+ counter-protest CHADS 💪🏃‍♂️!

Footage? PURE COMEDY GOLD 🎥😂 – Balat lights fuse 🕯️💨, CHUCKS first dud at barrier 🧱🚫, grabs second from Kayumi, RUNS like a scared puppy 🐶💨 then DROPS it like it's HOT 🔥🍑! Mamdani 👨‍🦱🏛️ calls protest 'BIGOTRY BARF 🤮' but bomber bros 'EVEN MORE SUS 😈' – vows FULL ACCOUNTABILITY 🔒⚖️ and ZERO TOLERANCE for terror tantrums in NYC 🗽🚫! Tisch hails HERO COPS 🦸‍♂️🦸‍♀️ who YEETED in sans hesitation, saving the day amid US-Israel-Iran TENSION SIMMER ⭕🇮🇱🇮🇷!

FBI JTTF GOON SQUAD 🕵️‍♀️🔫 on it: Interviews, vids, leads CHASED 🐶📹 – plus Ian McGuiness 21yo PEPPER SPRAY PUNK 🌶️😡 BUSTED for gassing counter-protesters, him +3 more hit with disorderly DUD charges 🤡🚔! These TATP terrorists thought they'd GO VIRAL like Boston Bros 🏆💣 but ended up ARRESTED NOOBS 😭🔒 – NYPD VIGILANT AF 👀🛡️, no room for jihadi Ls in the Big Apple 🍎😂! Mayor's like 'We KEEPIN NYC SAFE 👊🗽' while these clowns stay CAGED 🐒🏛️!
